raw.title: Building a Future When Empire Is Obsolete
raw.excerpt: A future without successive catastrophes requires solutions that put a culture of care at the heart of relationships with each other and the earth.

llm_processed.summary: This article explores post-imperial governance models that prioritize ecological and social well-being over centralized control, aligning with degrowth and cooperative governance ideas.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Connects to alternative political systems that could inform solarpunk-inspired decentralized governance structures.
